titleZh: 新修订《公司法》与公司治理结构重建
titleEn: Rebuilding Company Governance Structure Under the Newly Revised PRC Company Law
abstractZh: 围绕新《公司法》施行后治理层级、董监高职责及股东参与机制的重构进行实务解析，提供审查清单与条款衔接建议。
abstractEn: Practical analysis of governance redesign after the 2023 amendment, including board structures, managerial duties and shareholder process updates.
